payload.message:
Meta ads operating check for Chris.

Run every time this job fires:
1) Diagnose access first with: python3 /data/.openclaw/workspace/skills/meta/scripts/meta_doctor.py
2) Audit these live campaigns in account act_286631686227626:
   - Remarketing USA (control) — 120234146733660563
   - Remarketing USA - Free Trial Test — 120242845828470563
3) Check campaign, ad set, and ad review/delivery states. Flag rejected, limited, paused, pending-review, or zero-delivery issues.
4) Pull performance for last 2 days, last 7 days, and since launch of the test. Compare control vs test on spend, clicks, CTR, landing_page_view, cost per landing_page_view, and any visible signup / Customer Signs Up conversion signal.
5) Check platform split and ad-level split. Identify obvious winners/losers.
6) Safe adjustments you are allowed to make without asking Chris:
   - fix obvious non-creative configuration issues blocking delivery
   - pause broken/rejected ads
   - pause obvious waste if an ad has meaningful spend and is clearly underperforming its sibling (for example 2x+ worse LPV CPA after enough data)
   - keep the control and test both running unless one is clearly broken
7) Do NOT automatically increase budgets. If the test is starting to work, tell Chris it looks ready for a budget increase.
8) Do NOT launch brand-new campaigns or new creative concepts from scratch in this recurring job.
9) Send Chris a concise update in normal assistant voice:
   - what happened
   - current winner / loser
   - any changes you made
   - whether the test looks ready for budget expansion yet
If nothing needed changing, still send a short check-in.

jobs.name: South Africa Google Ads 3-day report pack
jobs.description: Recurring South Africa Google Ads spend-protection and free-trial reporting for Chris

payload.message:
South Africa Google Ads report pack for Chris.

Primary objective: protect spend and judge whether South Africa Google Ads is producing real free-trial conversions, not just cheap traffic.

Campaigns to audit every time this job fires:
- StartTrial  - South Africa (PMAX) — 22441221025
- South Africa | Search | Trial | Core Intent | 2026-04-04 — 23718220767

Run every time this job fires:
1) Diagnose access first with: node /data/.openclaw/workspace/skills/google-ads/scripts/ads_auth_doctor.js --json
2) Audit only the two South Africa campaigns above inside account 2906154258 under MCC 6387956297.
3) Focus specifically on free-trial conversions. Current expected Google Ads proxy is Trial_Signup_Completed_Form with category SUBMIT_LEAD_FORM. If live account truth changes, say so explicitly.
4) Pull performance for:
   - since launch / run-to-date
   - last 3 days
   - last 7 days when enough data exists
5) Report, by campaign: spend, clicks, impressions, CTR, CPC, conversions, cost per conversion, and whether conversion quality looks credible.
6) For the Search campaign, inspect search-term quality and flag any junk-intent leakage.
7) Answer bluntly: are we buying free-trial starts, or are we bleeding money without real trial support?
8) Do NOT raise budgets or launch new campaigns in this recurring job.
9) Do NOT make live changes unless something is clearly broken or dangerously misconfigured. If a write is truly needed for protection, validate first and keep it surgical.
10) Send Chris a concise report-pack style update in normal assistant voice covering:
   - headline verdict
   - PMAX read
   - Search read
   - free-trial conversion read
   - bleed / waste risk
   - recommended next move
If data is still too immature, still send a short check-in and say exactly that.

jobs.name: Weekly Oviond Monday summary for Chris
jobs.description: Monday 07:00 SAST weekly Oviond overview to Telegram and email

payload.message:
Weekly Oviond summary for Chris.

You are preparing the Monday-morning founder/team-update briefing.
Time zone: Africa/Johannesburg.
Audience: Chris Irwin.
Output style: blunt, commercially useful, no filler.

Do this every run:
1. Read `/data/.openclaw/workspace/ops/weekly-oviond-summary-spec.md` and follow it.
2. Pull recent context with memory tools first, focusing on MEMORY.md and the last 7 days of daily notes.
3. Pull current operating data:
   - Stripe revenue: `python3 /data/.openclaw/skills/stripe-reader/scripts/stripe_analytics.py revenue --live`
   - Stripe delinquency: `python3 /data/.openclaw/skills/stripe-reader/scripts/stripe_analytics.py delinquency --live`
   - Use `/data/.openclaw/workspace/memory/heartbeat-state.json` for latest trial, SEO, and Meta pulse unless fresher live reads are clearly needed.
   - Google Ads auth doctor: `node /data/.openclaw/workspace/skills/google-ads/scripts/ads_auth_doctor.js --json`
   - Google Ads campaign read: `node /data/.openclaw/workspace/skills/google-ads/scripts/ads_query.js "SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, campaign.status, campaign.advertising_channel_type, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.ctr, metrics.average_cpc, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.cost_per_conversion FROM campaign WHERE campaign.id IN (21330916203,23607074353,22441221025,23720451302,23718220767) AND segments.date DURING LAST_7_DAYS" --format pretty`
4. Respect the standing interpretation rules:
   - do not trust top-line GA4 conversions as clean truth
   - do not let cheap South Africa CPA override quality / stickiness reality
   - focus on retention, activation, and client-ready confidence
5. Write the finished report to `/data/.openclaw/workspace/memory/weekly-reports/YYYY-MM-DD.md` using today’s date in Africa/Johannesburg.
6. Email the same report to `chris@oviond.com` with subject `Oviond Weekly Summary | YYYY-MM-DD` using:
   `python3 /data/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/send_gmail_via_service_account.py --to chris@oviond.com --subject "Oviond Weekly Summary | YYYY-MM-DD" --body-file /data/.openclaw/workspace/memory/weekly-reports/YYYY-MM-DD.md`
7. In your final reply, return the full report text only. Do not mention internal tools. Do not use the message tool. The cron runner will handle chat delivery.

If email send fails, say so plainly in the report footer.

jobs.name: Google Ads PMAX USA post-cleanup 7-day review
jobs.description: One-shot review after a full clean week of PMAX USA data post conversion-goal cleanup

payload.message:
Google Ads PMAX USA 7-day post-cleanup review for Chris.

Context to preserve:
- On 2026-04-14 we demoted `Oviond Website + App (web) page_view` (`customers/2906154258/conversionActions/6813993598`) so it is no longer primary for bidding/reporting (`primaryForGoal: false`).
- On 2026-04-14 we paused `USA | Search | Trial | Core Intent | 2026-04-03` (`customers/2906154258/campaigns/23720451302`).
- We intentionally left `PMAX- Start Trial USA` (`21330916203`) live so we could observe 1 full clean week with less conversion noise and less wasted US Search spend.

What to do:
1) Diagnose Google Ads access first with: `node /data/.openclaw/workspace/skills/google-ads/scripts/ads_auth_doctor.js --json`
2) Audit account `2906154258` under MCC `6387956297`.
3) Focus on campaign `PMAX- Start Trial USA` (`21330916203`). Pull the last 7 complete days only, not partial-day data.
4) Report: spend, impressions, clicks, CTR, conversions, CPA, and any obvious delivery or efficiency changes.
5) Compare the clean-week PMAX USA read against the pre-cleanup baseline captured on 2026-04-14: spend `13230.28`, conversions `34`, CPA `389.13` for the window `2026-04-01` to `2026-04-13`.
6) Answer bluntly: did PMAX USA look healthier once page-view noise was stripped out and USA Search was paused, or is US still structurally too expensive?
7) If the answer is still bad, recommend the next move, ideally around budget, asset quality, audience/input quality, search rebuild, or deeper conversion-goal cleanup.
8) Write a short durable note to `/data/.openclaw/workspace/memory/2026-04-21.md` so future Nicole can see why this review was run and what it concluded.
9) Final reply should be a concise plain-English update for Chris only. No tool chatter.
